◎译　　名　武汉战疫纪

　　　　　  谭德塞·阿达诺姆 Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus


◎简　　介  

　　At 10 a.m. on January 23, Wuhan went into lockdown. This was done to stop a deadly virus from spreading further across the nation. It was one day before Chinese New Year's Eve, a major travel day for people planning to return home for the holidays. This documentary is dedicated to all those who've been battling tirelessly against the COVID-19 virus in order to keep the epidemic...
